# YouTube Downloader

A simple Python script to download YouTube videos using yt-dlp.

## Setup

1. Make sure you have Python installed
2. Run the batch file `run_youtube_downloader.bat` to start the downloader

## Usage

1. Run the batch file
2. Paste YouTube URLs one per line
3. Type 'done' when finished entering URLs
4. Videos will be downloaded to the `downloads` folder

## Requirements

- Python 3.6+
- yt-dlp (automatically installed in virtual environment)

## Notes

- Videos are downloaded in the best available quality
- Downloads are saved in a `downloads` folder in the same directory as the script
